name: Muse Dash
description: Muse Dash is a rhythm game where you hit objects to the beat of one of 400+ songs.

options.label: Progression Balancing
options.description: A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

options.label: Accessibility
options.description: Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

options.label: Dlc Packs
options.description: Choose which DLC Packs will be included in the pool of chooseable songs.

options.label: Streamer Mode Enabled
options.description: In Muse Dash, an option named 'Streamer Mode' removes songs which may trigger copyright issues when streaming.

options.label: Starting Song Count
options.description: The number of songs that will be automatically unlocked at the start of a run.

options.label: Additional Song Count
options.description: The total number of songs that will be placed in the randomization pool.

options.label: Song Difficulty Mode
options.description: Ensures that at any chosen song has at least 1 value falling within these values.

options.label: Song Difficulty Min
options.description: Ensures that 1 difficulty has at least 1 this value or higher per song.

options.label: Song Difficulty Max
options.description: Ensures that 1 difficulty has at least 1 this value or lower per song.

options.label: Grade Needed
options.description: Completing a song will require a grade of this value or higher in order to unlock items.

options.label: Music Sheet Count Percentage
options.description: Controls how many music sheets are added to the pool based on the number of songs, including starting songs.

options.label: Music Sheet Win Count Percentage
options.description: The percentage of Music Sheets in the item pool that are needed to unlock the winning song.

options.label: Chosen Traps
options.description: This controls the types of traps that can be added to the pool.

options.label: Trap Count Percentage
options.description: This controls how many traps to add into the pool, based the total number of songs.

options.label: Death Link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies.

options.label: Include Songs
options.description: These songs will be guaranteed to show up within the seed.
